name: task_next_available
description: Get the next workable task based on priority, dependency resolution, and optional filters. Returns the highest-priority task that has all dependencies satisfied and is ready to transition to 'in_progress'. Use this for automated task picking and work queue management.

team_id.description: Optional team ID to scope the search to tasks within a specific team

agent_id.description: Optional agent ID to prefer tasks assigned to a specific agent or to scope unassigned tasks

examples.name: Get next available task for any agent
Get next available task for a specific agent
